holdings.infoBox: VEU is an equity ETF with a total of 3895 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 4.37%, Samsung Electronics at 2.41%, SK hynix at 2.05%, ASML Holding at 1.53%, and Slbbh1142 at 1.25%.

overview.description: The Vanguard FTSE All-World ex-US Index Fund (VEU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE All-World x US indexThe fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of large- and midcap non-US stocks VEU was launched on Mar 2, 2007 and is issued by Vanguard.
